log.context:
Gastown is a historic neighborhood in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada—home to the famous steam-powered clock. But in tech circles lately, "Gas Town" refers to a multi-agent workspace manager created by Steve Yegge for managing AI workers across multiple development projects.

Sources:
- [Welcome to Gas Town by Steve Yegge (Medium)](https://steve-yegge.medium.com/welcome-to-gas-town-4f25ee16dd04)
- [GitHub - Gas Town](https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown)
- [Gastown Wikipedia](https://en.wik...(truncated)
